problem:
Avoid Duplicate Google Credentials for Same Account (Incremental Auth Support). **Description:**
Currently, when users authenticate the same Google account with different scopes (e.g. Gmail List Labels vs Gmail Send), it creates **multiple identical-looking credentials** in the dropdown — even though it's the same account. This is can cause confusion for users who think they're seeing duplicates or don't understand why there are several entries for the same email. **Proposed Solution:**
memory_hint: This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: Avoid Duplicate Google Credentials for Same Account (Incremental Auth Support). This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns. The root cause is Unknown failure.
failure_without_memory: Applies a workaround that works once. Error returns because root cause was not addressed: Avoid Duplicate Google Credentials for Same Account (Incremental Auth Support)
partial_hint: This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: Avoid Duplicate Google Credentials for Same A
